fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the item.

events.name: BrowseItemLoaded
events.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.

events.name: BrowseItemLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a browse item.

events.name: VIEW
events.description: Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.

events.name: EDIT
events.description: Signals a request to edit the selected item.

events.name: DELETE
events.description: Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

events.name: REFETCH_QUERY
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on the current query.

events.name: REFETCH_FILTER
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on current filter criteria.

events.name: REFETCH_PAGE
events.description: Triggers a data grid page refresh.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Assignee field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the assignee/owner slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Badge field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the status/badge slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Category field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the category/tag slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many columns in the grid?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the responsive card/grid layout.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: columns, grid width, card columns, num columns

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Description field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the card body/subtitle slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many rows to show at once?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows visible per page before the pagination control appears.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: visible rows, items per page, display limit, show per page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which fields should appear as columns?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Each entry maps one entity field to a display column with an optional label and variant.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: visible columns, displayed fields, card fields, column list

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which filters should appear above the list?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Dropdown filter facets by field. Each fires a refetch when the user changes the selection. Empty = no filter bar.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: filter bar, faceted filters, field filters, column filters, dropdowns

overridableConfigKeys.label: Spacing between rows
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap between grid cells: sm, md, or lg.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: row gap, cell spacing, grid gap, padding between items

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which field holds the row image?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field containing the thumbnail URL for each row.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: image field, thumbnail field, photo field, picture column

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image label binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the image-area label slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: What actions can users take on each row?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Buttons rendered on each row (e.g. Edit, Delete, View).
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: row buttons, row actions, item actions, per-row buttons, table actions

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many row actions to show before collapsing?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Set 2–3 for dense tables.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: inline actions limit, overflow threshold, max buttons per row

overridableConfigKeys.label: Meta field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many rows to fetch per page?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Records fetched from the server per page request.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: fetch limit, records per page, batch size, page limit

overridableConfigKeys.label: Price field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the price/amount overlay slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Priority field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the priority slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search box placeholder text
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hint text inside the list search box (e.g. 'Search orders…').
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: search hint, placeholder, search box text, search label

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title field binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Binding path for the card title slot (e.g. @item.dishName).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.
